name: Respite
descs:
[Effects apply only to #1, #2 Deployed Identities]

Activates upon Clash Win using a Skill that inflicts [Laceration] Potency, Count, or 'Unique Bleed'

Inflict +(# of remaining Coins/2) [Laceration] Count to the target, and gain [AttackUp] equal to that value next turn

For Skills with 2- Coins, use (# of remaining Coins+3) to calculate instead
